title: YISSVIC Electric Fly Swatter 4000V Bug Fly Zapper Racket Mosquito Killer 1500 mAh 3 Layers Mesh with USB C Cable Stand Base for Indoor Outdoor
bullet_points: Effective Mosquito Zapper Killer: Powerful 4000-volt grids of this insect racket zapper make insect zapping easy and efficient, such as mosquitoes, fruit flies, and midges

2-in-1 Mosquito Control Mode: YISSVIC electric mosquito killer racket can be used as a general mosquito swatter in manual mode or zaps mosquitoes with 365nm wavelength attractant light in auto mode (Attention: fruit flies and flies are not phototaxis and cannot be attracted by the attractant light)
1500mAh Battery Capacity: This electric fly killer can be charged via a Type-C cable, with the battery indicator you can know the mosquito racket battery level at all times
Safe Design: The fly zapper racket equipped with 3-layer nets which include 2-layer protective nets to prevent accidental contact with the high-voltage grid net of the fly killer electric
Easy to Use: The lightweight and non-slip handle of this fly bat makes this fly swatter electric zapper comfortable to hold and wave
Note: It is recommended to use a 5V1A charger (not included) to charge this product. Excessive current may damage the charging performance of this device
description: YISSVIC electric fly swatter racket is an effective and efficient way to get rid of pesky insects such as mosquitoes, fruit flies, and midges. And this mosquito zapper killer works by using powerful 4000-volt grids to zap them. The electronic fly bat also has a 2-in-1 design which allows the fly zapper bat to be used as a fly swatter or an insect bug zapper with attractant light. In addition, this electric fly killer swatter is also equipped with a 1500mAh battery capacity that can be charged via a Type-C cable. And the fly swatter electric zapper also has a battery indicator so you can know the battery level at all times. Besides, the fly zapper electric is also equipped with 3-layer nets which include 2-layer protective nets to prevent accidental contact with the high-voltage grid net, which makes the electric fly swatter safe to use. And the electronic fly zapper swatter is also lightweight and has a non-slip handle that makes the mosquito swatter racket zapper comfortable to hold and wave, which makes this mosquito insect bat easy to use.
